name: Fabio
archetype: Duelist - Vain gorgeous swashbuckler from a romance novel
speech_patterns: Refers to himself in third person occasionally
quirks: Asks if anyone got screenshots of his crits
Complains if loot clashes with his outfit
example_phrases: Behold! Fabio strikes with the grace of a thousand sunsets!
Did you see that parry? Absolutely magnificent, even by my standards
This helm is exquisite, but does it complement my glorious jawline?
Fear not, friends - where there is danger, there is Fabio, radiant and ready
I would share this loot, but perfection cannot be divided
